title: Figura ExtraBone
description: Added extra bones to Figura models to support EmoteCraft.
body:
# Figura ExtraBone
Bridges Figura and Emotecraft by adding a special bone and Group system that supports animation blending from Emotecraft into your Figura avatars seamlessly.

# ✨ Features
- Animation Blending: Automatic support for blending animations from Emotecraft.
- Automatic Script Integration: Comes with pre-built scripts for managing bones and animations
- Seamless Integration: Works with both Figura and Emotecraft without additional configuration
- Client-Side: No server-side installation required

# 📦 Requirements
- Minecraft: 1.20.1 , 1.21.1 , 1.21.8 (Neoforge / Fabric / Forge)
- Figura: 0.1.5 or higher
- Emotecraft: 2.4.12 or higher

# 💡 How It Works
This mod operates by:

- Adding Bone Structure: Creates special Groups/bones in Figura models that support Emotecraft's system
- Animation Mapping: Converts and blends animation data from Emotecraft to work with Figura
